div.div:
/autofix-triage
Parse Jira bug ticket
Orient via ARCHITECTURE.md, CLAUDE.md
Explore code, locate bug area
Assess readiness (3-gate rubric)
Write .triage-verdict.json

div.div:
/autofix-research
Parse spike ticket (no repo)
Investigate topic, gather findings
Synthesize recommendations
Write verdict (type: research)

div.div:
/autofix-cve-resolve
State-machine dispatcher
Scan, fix, verify, VEX, review, PR
Per-repo, per-branch processing
Deterministic routing (cve_pipeline.py)
Write verdict

div.div:
/autofix-resolve
Read ticket + project conventions
Implement agent (prompt-based)
Review agent + merge findings
Evaluate severity, iterate (max 3x)
Write verdict
